case_title: PORTER, WILLIAM R. vs. VIVA TEE SHIRTS, INC. ; et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTER, WILLIAM R. SERVED FEB-02-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRESENTACION BARRETTO BARRETTO, SUSAN

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRE- SENTED BY HIS COUNSEL MATT FICK. DEF. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY HIS COUNSEL MICHAEL DIAZ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - $8,998.66 PRINCIPAL - COSTS PER COST BILL - ATTY FEES PER SCHEDULE. PL. WILL ACCEPT FOLLOWING PMTS. - $3,000 PD. TODAY - $1,000 BY 9-12-93 - $500 BY 10-12-93. IF PMTS ARE MADE TIMELY, PL. WILL ACCEPT THE $4,500 AS COMPLETE PMT. OF JUDGMENT, S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. IF DEF. FAILS ON PMT SCHEDULE, DEFAULT WILL ENTER & FULL PMT OF $8,998.66 WILL BE REQUIRED WITH CREDIT GIVEN FOR THOSE PMTS ALREADY MADE. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
